description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a smooth, wood-textured finish. The front side has three subtle horizontal divisions, suggesting the presence of shallow drawers integrated seamlessly into the facade. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and a uniform appearance. The wood grain pattern is consistent across all visible surfaces, giving the desk a cohesive and contemporary look. The desk is of medium height, suitable for sitting and working comfortably with a chair. Its sturdy construction and neutral color make it ideal for professional or home office environments.
description: A modern, rectangular wood-textured desk with integrated front drawers and solid side and back panels. The design is minimalist and suitable for office or home use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three integrated drawers and the open leg space beneath the desktop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood-textured panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a continuous solid panel with no drawers or openings, emphasizing structural support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood-textured panel.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three integrated drawers is intended to face the user, providing access to storage and workspace, while the solid panel is the back.
